approvedOverrides.reason: Replaces a generic/unclear overcup oak image with a verified image showing both overcup oak leaves and the diagnostic acorn cup.
The live data used the exact same image URL as Quercus rubra. This replacement is a public-domain Shumard oak leaf image.
The live data reused the same image as plain Loropetalum chinense. This replacement is specifically labeled var. rubrum and shows the pink/red flowers.

approvedOverrides.reason: The live data reused the same image as Ilex cornuta 'Burfordii'. This replacement is from a cultivar-specific Rotunda holly page and shows its distinctive spiny leaves.
